purpose: Extraction provenance manifest: unchanged card bodies equal the original SKILL.md byte range; reviewed post-extraction evolutions pin their current body hash to a live same-repository GitHub issue node and body/title anchor while preserving the contained committed original snapshot and hash.
router_preamble: Route with the table below and read the linked card before applying a pattern; the cards are the canonical harness bodies.

cards.title: Fable Harness: long coding or migration tasks
cards.route_hint: Start with repository map and invariants.

cards.title: Implementation Validation Gate
cards.route_hint: Use for any implementation task with a clear behavioral target, not only

evolution.reason: Make pre/post clone-family closure an active implementation completion gate.

cards.title: Mythos Defensive Harness
cards.route_hint: Confirm authorization and target scope.

cards.title: Cyber Frontier Defense Harness
cards.route_hint: Use only for authorized defensive work.

evolution.reason: Keep defensive patch scope narrow while routing any discovered semantic clone family through codebase-wide consolidation.

cards.title: Workflow self-improvement
cards.route_hint: Inspect current agent config, skills, commands, hooks, and usage patterns.

cards.title: Loop Engineering and Job Automation Harness
cards.route_hint: Use this when the task asks agents to keep running across turns,

cards.title: High-signal research synthesis
cards.route_hint: Separate primary sources from user reports.

cards.route_hint: Identify which benchmark capability is being targeted: agentic coding,

cards.route_hint: Do not apply the coding harness to every benchmark. Route first by task

cards.title: Knowledge Crystallization Harness
cards.route_hint: Classify subject, answer type, and required exactness.

cards.title: Legal Reasoning Harness
cards.route_hint: Identify jurisdiction, authority type, date, procedural posture, and task

cards.title: Bio/Health Safety Harness
cards.route_hint: Classify whether the task is benign explanation, clinical guidance, lab

cards.title: Evidence Table Harness
cards.route_hint: Extract document, table, chart, and source facts before analysis.

cards.route_hint: Do not assume higher effort is better. If `xhigh` or max effort underperforms

cards.title: Best-Practice Gate
cards.route_hint: Use official or upstream documentation for current claims before updating the

cards.title: Evaluated Feedback Loop
cards.route_hint: Treat failed benchmark criteria as reusable feedback, not just result data.

cards.title: Fairy Fusion Harness
cards.route_hint: Choose the fusion mode before running reviewers.

evolution.reason: Define bounded, decision-only automatic trigger conditions, evidence fields, and the one-level recursion cap.

cards.title: Steady Behavior Harness
cards.route_hint: Keep ordinary responses natural and lightly formatted. Use bullets, headings,

cards.route_hint: Instrument before solving: frame capture, replay, score ledger, action logs,
